name: Zytherion Coin
description: Zytherion is a next-generation, future-proof Layer-1 privacy blockchain built to withstand the quantum computing era. By integrating Deterministic Lattice-based Learning With Errors (LWR) hashing, Proof of Valuable Locking (PoVL) VDF, and ZK-SNARKs (Groth16), Zytherion delivers unparalleled on-chain anonymity and quantum-resistant security. Supported by a highly efficient Green BFT consensus mechanism, it empowers decentralized networks with institutional-grade cryptographic privacy and seamless mobile-node verification capabilities.
